case_title: JUAN RAMON GONZALEZ VS. SALVADOR LOPEZ

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GONZALEZ, JUAN RAMON ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-18-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JAN-13-2016 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF GONZALEZ, JUAN RAMON AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, SALVADOR
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,500.00 FILED BY GONZALEZ, JUAN RAMON AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, SALVADOR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-18-2015 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SPANISH INTERPRETER MARGO SEELY WAS PRESENT AND READY TO ASSIST THE PLAINTIFF, WHO DID NOT APPEAR. THE INTERPRETER'S IDENTIFICATION HAS BEEN VERIFIED, VIA EMPLOYEE BADGE OR OTHER DOCUMENTATION, PROVING CERTIFICATION OR REGISTRATION AND PHOTO IDENTIFICATION. THE INTERPRETER HAS AN OATH ON FILE WITH THE COURT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
